title: LinkedIn Post & Comment Scraper
description: Scrape LinkedIn posts and comments by keyword or direct URL. No cookie required.

keywords.title: Search Keywords
keywords.description: Search terms to find LinkedIn posts. The actor discovers post URLs via DuckDuckGo (free) and optionally Google Custom Search (free API key, better results). Max 20 keywords per run.
keywords.sectionDescription: Find LinkedIn posts by keyword. The actor uses search engines to discover public post URLs.

startUrls.title: Direct Post URLs
startUrls.description: Scrape specific LinkedIn post URLs directly. Use this OR keywords.

maxPostsPerKeyword.title: Max Posts per Keyword
maxPostsPerKeyword.description: Maximum number of posts to collect per keyword.

dateFilter.title: Date Filter
dateFilter.description: Only discover posts from this time period.

scrapeComments.title: Scrape Comments
scrapeComments.description: Extract comments from each post (up to ~10 per post via JSON-LD). Includes commenter name, text, and date.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy for HTTP requests. Strongly recommended for reliable results — without proxy, LinkedIn rate-limits after ~10 requests. Each request uses a fresh proxy IP for automatic rotation.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: Without proxy the actor works for small test runs (~5 posts). For production use, enable Apify proxy — it rotates IPs automatically per request to avoid LinkedIn rate limits.
